title: dianthus × mansanetianus
intro: Dianthus × mansanetianus, also known as Dianthus Mansanetianus, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, with medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective against infections and wounds. The health benefits of Dianthus × mansanetianus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
